title: Claude Code Just Dropped /Goal. (Master it in 8 Minutes).
summary: Anthropic released the /goal command for Claude Code, a feature that allows users to specify a task and a completion criterion, then Claude executes it autonomously with a second AI verifying completion. The video demonstrates the feature with a live demo creating a content calendar for a pizza shop.
